description: Configure the Weasis user interface for a low-light reading room environment while a CT scan is loaded. Change the application theme to a dark variant (such as 'Flat Dark' or 'Dark') and set the base UI font size to at least 16. Save a full-screen screenshot to '~/DICOM/exports/ergonomic_ui.png' and create a text file at '~/DICOM/exports/ui_settings.txt' documenting the applied theme name and font size.
